final:
module ring_counter
    (
        input clk,
        input reset,
        output reg [2:0] q
    );

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) 
    begin
        if (reset)
            q <= 3'b001;
        else
            q <= {q[1:0], q[2]};
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q
